case_title: LABOR COMMISSION STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. ROMA FAST FOODS, INC, A CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF LABOR COMMISSION STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT ROMA FAST FOODS, INC, A CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LABOR COMMISSION STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROMA FAST FOODS, INC, A CORPORATION $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,225.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
